---
title: ""
format: 
    closeread-html:
        html:
            page-layout: full
            self-contained: true
        cr-section:
            layout: "overlay-center"
bibliography: refs.bib
suppress-bibliography: true
---

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero">
  <span class="kicker">Economic Trends Analysis · 1960-Present</span>
  <h1>Title</h1>
  <p class="dek">Has food gotten more or less affordable? How does this affect different types of food and different types of Americans?</p>
  <p class="byline"> 
    <a href="references.html">All Sources</a> ·
    <a href="tech_appendix.html">Technical Appendix</a> ·
    <a href="ai_log.html">AI Usage Log</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

::: {.chart-wrap}
![](img/intro.png)
[Source: National Council on Aging (ncoa.org)]{.caption}
:::

::: {.prose}
Text
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/percent_food_expenditure.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Caption here.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/food_vs_overall_inflation.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Indexed to Jan 1960=100.]{.caption}
:::


::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/home_vs_away.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Indexed to Jan 1960=100.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/grocery_categories.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Indexed to Jan 1967=100.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/spending_by_outlet.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[USDA constant dollars.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/line_grocery_income.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Food at home / groceries specifically.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/bar_grocery_income.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[Food at home / groceries specifically.]{.caption}
:::

::: {.chart-wrap}
<iframe src="charts/map_food_sales_income.html" width=1000 height=600 style="border:none"></iframe>
[All food.]{.caption}
:::
